rationale.cost_effective: scored on the cost trade-off; lower spend is more cost-effective (FinOps + AWS WAF Cost Optimization)
rationale.performance_optimized: scored on the performance trade-off (AWS WAF Performance Efficiency)
rationale.customer_centric: scored on availability/uptime, which customers feel directly (AWS Reliability Pillar)
rationale.shareholder_centric: scored on cost efficiency, low maintenance complexity, and low vendor lock-in (Google Eng Practices + FinOps)
